title.zh: 《ReAct：在语言模型中协同推理与行动》
title.en: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models

notes.zh: 提出让语言模型交错生成推理轨迹、行动和环境观察的代表性论文。
notes.en: The representative paper introducing interleaved reasoning traces, actions, and environmental observations for language models.

title.zh: 《Toolformer：语言模型可以自学使用工具》
title.en: Toolformer: Language Models Can Teach Themselves to Use Tools

notes.zh: 展示语言模型学习何时以及如何调用外部 API 的原始论文。
notes.en: The original paper demonstrating how a language model can learn when and how to call external APIs.

title.zh: 《大语言模型驱动的自主智能体综述》
title.en: A Survey on Large Language Model Based Autonomous Agents

notes.zh: 梳理 LLM 智能体的规划、记忆、工具使用和评测框架。
notes.en: A survey organizing LLM-agent research around planning, memory, tool use, and evaluation.

notes.zh: 由 legacy 事件记录生成的临时来源占位，需要后续补充主论文或原始资料。
notes.en: Temporary source placeholder generated from the legacy event record; add primary papers or original sources later.
